zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Kent是Richard Kent的兒子，於1556年6月20日出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普。他於1585年6月20日與Ellen Pyle在英國英格蘭哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1701年住在英國爾巴堂姆利。他去世於1605年4月25日在英國哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾奧維 瓦洛普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Kent是Richard Kent的儿子，于1556年6月20日出生在英国英格兰哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普。他于1585年6月20日与Ellen Pyle在英国英格兰哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1701年住在英国爾巴堂姆利。他去世于1605年4月25日在英国哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾奧維 瓦洛普。

nameMeanings.name: Kent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from the county of Kent. The surname is also established in Ireland, where English bearers of this name settled in Meath, in the 13th century. The name has been Gaelicized as Ceannt.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Kent was born on 20 June 1556, in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Richard Kent. He married Ellen Pyle on 20 June 1585, in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Barthomley, Cheshire, England in 1701. He died on 25 April 1605, in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Over Wallop, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Kent est né le 20 juin 1556, à Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Richard Kent. Il a épousé Ellen Pyle le 20 juin 1585, à Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Barthomley, Cheshire, Angleterre en 1701. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1605, à Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Over Wallop, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Kentは1556年6月20日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアネスエル ワロップでRichard Kentの息子として生まれた。1585年6月20日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアネスエル ワロップでEllen Pyleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1701年にはイギリスチェシュアイアバーソムリーに住んでいた。彼は1605年4月25日にイギリスハンプシュアイアネスエル ワロップで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアオバー ワロップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Kent(은)는 1556년 6월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 네터 월로프에서 Richard Kent의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1585년 6월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 네터 월로프에서 Ellen Pyle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1701년도에 영국 체실르 바톰리에서 살았다. 그는 1605년 4월 25일 영국 함프실르 네터 월로프에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 버 월로프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Kent nasceu em 20 de junho de 1556, em Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Richard Kent. Ele casou-se com Ellen Pyle em 20 de junho de 1585, em Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Barthomley, Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1701. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1605, em Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Over Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Kent родился 20 июня 1556 г. в местности нетир валлоп, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Richard Kent. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Pyle 20 июня 1585 г. в местности нетир валлоп, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности бартомли, чешир, Англия в 1701 году. Он умер 25 апреля 1605 г. в местности нетир валлоп, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности овир валлоп, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.
